---
title: "building-demographics"
output: html_document
---

Notes:
- ctrl + alt + i creates a new code chunk
- ctrl + enter lets you run a single line of code
- ?function_name() opens a help window with the function documentation
- R can only read file paths with / not \
- ctrl + shift + m for the pipe operator

# Library load
```{r}
library(tidyverse)

source("C:/GitHub/digital-equity/libraries.R")
datapath <- "C:/Users/aalmanzar/OneDrive - Metropolitan Area Planning Council/Digital Equity - Resident Engagement Release Forms/Demographic analysis/"


```

# Data load
```{r}
building_addresses <- readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(datapath,"AWF Sites Clean Addresses_May2026_clean.xlsx"), #col_types = "ciciccccc", 
                                        n_max = 50, trim_ws = TRUE)
HUD <- read_csv(paste0(datapath,'HUD_MA_Projects_2025.csv'))

demographic_bg <- read_csv("https://staging.datacommon-react.mapc.org/api/export?token=datacommon&database=ds&schema=tabular&table=b03002_race_ethnicity_acs_bg&format=csv&years=2020-24&useMetadataColumns=false")
  
demographic_ct <- read_csv('https://datacommon.mapc.org/api/export?token=datacommon&database=ds&schema=tabular&table=b03002_race_ethnicity_acs_ct&format=csv&years=2020-24&useMetadataColumns=false')
```

# data cleanup
```{r}
bld_add_clean <- building_addresses |> 
  janitor::clean_names() |> 
  select(-c(dummy)) |> 
  mutate(
    full_address = paste(street_number, street, municipality, zip, state)
  )

# select relevant data columns, 2020 geography
demo_bg_clean <-demographic_bg %>% 
  select(bg20_id,totpop,nhwhi,nhaa,nhoth,lat,totpop_me,nhwhi_me,nhaa_me,nhoth_me,lat_me)
  
demo_ct_clean <-demographic_ct %>% 
  select(ct20_id,totpop,nhwhi,nhaa,nhoth,lat,totpop_me,nhwhi_me,nhaa_me,nhoth_me,lat_me)


  
  
  
```

# analysis
```{r}
buildings_geo <- bld_add_clean %>% 
  geocode(full_address, method = 'arcgis', lat = lat, long = long)

buildings_points <- buildings_geo %>% 
  st_as_sf(coords = c('long', 'lat'),
             crs = st_crs(lat_lon_CRS),
             remove = FALSE)

ct_shape <- mapcdatakeys::tract_sf(2020)

bg_shape <- mapcdatakeys::blockgroup_sf(2020)
  
  
  
buildings_join <- buildings_points |> 
    #setting crs to match polygon shapefile
    st_transform(mass_mainland, crs = st_crs(ct_shape)) |> 
    #polygon_field can be one field you want to add or a list of fields
    st_join(select(ct_shape, ct20_id, geometry)) 
  
buildings_final <- buildings_join %>% 
  mutate(ct20_id=as.double(ct20_id)) %>% 
  left_join(demo_ct_clean,by='ct20_id') %>% 
  st_drop_geometry()

buildings_join_bg <- buildings_points |> 
    #setting crs to match polygon shapefile
    st_transform(mass_mainland, crs = st_crs(bg_shape)) |> 
    #polygon_field can be one field you want to add or a list of fields
    st_join(select(bg_shape, bg20_id, geometry)) 
  
buildings_final_bg <- buildings_join_bg %>% 
  mutate(bg20_id=as.double(bg20_id)) %>% 
  left_join(demo_bg_clean,by='bg20_id') %>% 
  st_drop_geometry()

```

#Write Final Data
```{r}
write.csv(buildings_final,paste0(datapath,"buildingsct.csv"))

write.csv(buildings_final_bg,paste0(datapath,"buildingsbg.csv"))
```
